LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BIJAN BAHAR'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS DENIED. SAN FRANCISCO IS A PROPER PLACE OF VENUE AS THE COUNTY WHERE THE CONTRACT IN FACT WAS ENTERED INTO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ROBERT GLASSER, ESQ., 949.752.2727, FOR DEFENDANT BIJAN BAHAR; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BIJAN BAHAR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 15 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Change Of Venue; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Jul-13-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ASHLEY A. CONNELL OF THE LAW OFFICES OF MICHAEL S. SORGEN, TEL. NO. 956-1360 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BIJAN BAHAR'S MOTION For Change Of Venue is Denied. San Francisco is a proper place of venue as the county where the contract in fact was entered into. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HK

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Change Of Venue; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Continued To Jul-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was announced in court. DEFENDANT BIJAN BAHAR'S Motion For Change Of Venue is continued to July 13, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 302 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
